metadata.rationale: Sucrose enrichment per user request - key player needed deeper coverage

status_changes.MAX2: source -> downstream (gained Sucrose inhibitor; Perception Gate becomes sucrose-modulated)

deliberate_exclusions: Sucrose -> D14 (E281): would predict wrong direction in framework (sucrose stabilizes inactive D14, but math treats more D14 = more SMXL degradation)
Sucrose -> Auxin (E278): bud-local biosynthesis but global Auxin node routes through CK suppression, opposite of net sucrose effect
Sucrose -> IPT3/IPT5: paralog-specific edges; Sucrose -> Cytokinin direct captures the effect
